caption:
Web tip: Why your website needs to load fast on mobile — not just desktop.

In Mauritius, over 75% of internet traffic is mobile. If your site isn't optimised for mobile, you're turning away 3 out of 4 visitors.

What slows down mobile sites:
✗ Uncompressed images (common on WordPress)
✗ Render-blocking JavaScript
✗ No lazy loading
✗ Shared hosting servers

What we do instead:
✓ Automatic image compression via Next.js Image component
✓ Edge CDN (Vercel) — fastest response globally
✓ Code-split JavaScript — only loads what's needed
✓ PageSpeed 95+ target on every single build

Mobile-first isn't a feature. It's the minimum.

→ bienzoli.com

#WebTips #MobileFirst #PageSpeed #NextJS #MauritiusDev

templateData.headline: Mobile speed is not optional.
templateData.bodyText: 75%+ of Mauritius internet traffic is mobile. Every second of load time costs you visitors. Here's what we optimise on every single build.
